value:
TEAM BRANTLEY CULTURE
Brantley Construction Services, LLC dba Brantley Construction Company, LLC (BCC) is one of the largest Commercial General Contractors in the tri-county and has been serving clients throughout the Southeast for 45 years.
Vision
The man leading the company, Founder, Former President Sidney Brantley, obtained a General Contractor’s License in 1976 and began work in a small room above his garage and never looked back. The office has since moved to its headquarters in Charleston, SC with a second office in Asheville, NC. Soon after founding BCC, Sid’s brother, Ron Brantley, joined the company and in a few years they completed their first 10-story mid rise. BCC soon brought on another brother, Gary Brantley, who is now President. Their milestones keep coming as the company keeps growing.
Who
BCC is a family-operated company. Along with the Gary Brantley, Matthew Brantley became a Vice-President in 2020. Additionally in 2021, Jacob Benson was promoted to Vice President in our North Carolina Division. Brantley Construction maintains a highly qualified management staff of three registered professional engineers and a LEED Accredited Professional. Our professional employees and support personnel include highly experienced superintendents, quality control and safety managers, along with foremen, carpenters, and other trade personnel to insure our projects are built to the highest quality standards.
How
When it comes to overall client satisfaction, Team Brantley ensure that you are well informed on project plans, costs, progress and all other aspects involved during the entirety of work. Most notably, we make each client feel like family.
OUR WORK
What we build
Brantley Construction Company, LLC has an outstanding track record of project delivery including design-build, design-bid-build, CM at Risk, Integrated Design Process (IDP), and negotiated contracts. Brantley Construction has worked with over 38 government agencies including the US Army Corps of Engineers, the Navy and the Air Force on projects in SC, NC, GA, and FL. Over our 43-year history, we have completed over 58 Federal projects. Within our Federal contracts, we have built or renovated barracks, ranges, access control, taxiways, SCIFs, Battalion and Company Operations facilities, and dining facilities. The diversity of our construction is as varied as our Owners, such as, healthcare, private offices, athletic facilities, educational, retail, warehouse and storage. Brantley Construction is a well-rounded, capable, and competent addition to any contract.
Services
BCC provides a wide range of services including preconstruction, project management, construction management, design-build, build-to-suit, development, up-fit, property restoration, and LEED sustainable construction. We build throughout the Southeast and currently hold an unlimited General Contractor’s license in the states of South Carolina, North Carolina, Georgia, and Florida.
With Team Brantley’s expertise in the construction industry and successful project outcomes, we are able maintain all of our professional relationships and establish new ones with Owners, Architects, Engineers and Subcontractors.
So the question stands…
What Can Brantley Build For You?
Brantley Construction welcomes the opportunity to team with you to construct a facility customized to your needs. We offer quality-driven prices and effective solutions that will not only meet, but also exceed your expectations. For more information, please give us a call at 843-552-0150.
